title: Decision Tree（决策树）
summary: Decision trees recursively partition feature space using impurity-based splits (entropy, Gini, chi-square) to build interpretable classification models, with pruning to control overfitting.
original_question: 请给我详细讲解一下决策树算法，包括算法的数学原理、算法的可视化、训练过程、效果评估、真实数据实战等。并构建一个白色、简约、学术风格的React网站进行讲解

relations.note: Both are supervised classification models; logistic regression uses linear boundaries while decision trees use axis-aligned recursive partitions.
Isolation Forest is built on random decision trees (isolation trees); shares tree-based concepts but used for unsupervised anomaly detection.

references.title: Breiman et al. (1984) - Classification and Regression Trees
